merged_events.event_description: American Embassy established in Colombo when Felix Cole presented credentials as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on August 3, 1949, when Felix Cole presented his credentials as American Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary.

matched.notes: Exact date and status match. RDCR confirms embassy established 1949-08-03 when Felix Cole presented credentials as Ambassador.
